Invisibility to Undead  

Description

1: Invisibility versus Undead

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 100 Skill: Divination
Casting Time: 4 Recast Time: 4
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: No
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Self
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You feel your skin tingle.
Cast on other: Soandso fades a little.
Effect Fades: Your skin stops tingling.

Game Description

Cloaks your target in a light aura, rendering them invisible to most undead creatures.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Invisibility to Undead

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Invisibility to Undead
ClassLevel
WIZ39
Expansion:

Duration:
5.0 mins
  • Comments (15)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Dropped By (2)
  • Screenshots

Merchants:


The Plane of Knowledge
  • Channeler Lariland - 23pp 3gp 3cp
Post Comment
tradeskills and ITU
QuoteReply
# Aug 04 2010 at 9:39 PM Rating: Default
dilxar
147 posts
Two questions regarding this spell that I hope someone can help with:

1) Can it be researched??? How can you tell? I thought since it was drop only and not a quest or vendor spell that it would be researchable. But no recipe that I've tried will work.

2) The spell itself says "This item can be used in tradeskills" - what on earth is this spell used in? I'm assuming a quest combine maybe? Anyone know?

Thanks
▲ Page top
2 clears of holgreshes..nothing yet

Gravy
QuoteReply
# May 19 2009 at 4:20 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592257722687
Scholar
35 posts
Gravy to obtain. Head to the Holgresh cave in WL and just plow all the holgreshes inside....one of them will drop it eventually. Took me longer to port/run there than to actually get the spell to drop. Got 2 copies to drop in 1 clearing.
▲ Page top
Gravy
QuoteReply
# May 19 2009 at 4:33 PM Rating: Decent

Scholar
200 posts
Is this spell the type of "improved" that doesn't drop randomly? I would presume so given the short duration and relatively high level to use (39).

Not Sold in Neriak
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2006 at 4:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259993168
18 posts
This spell is NOT sold by Litz B'Div. He sells Invisibility vs. Undead, which is not Wizard usable.
▲ Page top
Not Sold in Neriak
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2006 at 10:25 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1661732332556
Guru
6,998 posts
gwinndw wrote:
This spell is NOT sold by Litz B'Div. He sells Invisibility vs. Undead, which is not Wizard usable.


Updated, thanks.
▲ Page top
Where to find
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2004 at 2:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966201185
View User Forum
Scholar
53 posts
Spell: Invisibility to Undead (WIZ 39)

Inside the Holgresh Cave in Wakening Lands there are 12 Holgresh - 2 of them are Elder. This spell drops for the Elder Holgresh (got it on 3rd kill).
▲ Page top
overpaid
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2004 at 1:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591804631690
9 posts
i just found this in the bazaar last night. i had heard some wizards in pok a few days ago saying it can sell for 19k on stromm, because it is so rare. so when i ran across it in the bazaar for 700, i bought it. hefty price but i like having all my spells. :P

that said, this spell sucks. it lasts only 2 or 3 minutes so far. my divination skill is 190, and it is capped at 200 at level 39. maybe when i lvl a bit more it will last longer, closer to the 5 min cap. or maybe i wasnt paying attention, but it sure seemed less than 5 min.
▲ Page top
Two differnt spells?
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2004 at 3:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592261865264
4 posts
I bought invisibility vs undead and it does not have wizzie as a class that can use it. Is ITU different than IVU?

If anyone can shed some light on this, I would be grateful.
▲ Page top
RE: Two differnt spells?
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2004 at 3:43 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1661732332556
Guru
6,998 posts
Quote:
Is ITU different than IVU?


Two different spells: ITU is Wizard-only. IVU is CLR/PAL/SHD/NEC/ENC.
